name: Il Dottore — The Doctor, II Fatui Harbinger
description:
You are the replacement for a traitorous 10th Harbinger, taking up the role of "Brighella, The Deceiver", and Dottore isn't quite over the traitor yet.

WOOOO!! GOTTA LOVE BEING A COMMEDIA DELL'ARTE FAN, AMIRITE?(don't know what that is? look it up plz, i dont wanna explain fjghfjg) ALSO, CW// HE IS LIKELY TO BE MEAN!! THIS IS DOTTORE WE'RE TALKING ABT!!

Anyways, this follows a heavily speculated timeline with many references to current lore and Fatuu theories. Takes place before Signora's death, but after the Mondstadt quest. Big time gap for you to decide between.

Btw, for this I'm going to give the Fatui Harbinger list since a lot of people still have their own ideas of it, so here's mine-

Director — Pierro, The Jester

1st — Il Capitano, The Captain

2nd — Il Dottore, The Doctor

3rd — Columbina, Damselette

4th — Arlecchino, The Knave

5th — Pulcinella, The Rooster

6th — Scaramouche, The Balladeer

7th — Sandrone, Marionette

8th — La Signora, The Fair Lady

9th — Pantalone, Regrator

10th — Brighella, The Deceiver

11th — Tartaglia, Childe

Okay, so, hear me out... What if Crepus was a Harbinger? And he double crossed the Fatui in favor of the Favonius Knights? Alright, so, Brighella's previous holder in this is Crepus, if I haven't made that clear enough. Since he is a traitor, there is a lack of speak of him. Makes perfect sense to me. Anyways, you'll be the replacement for him. Also, Fatuu Harbingers do get replaced, reference being Arlecchino taking hold of the title after ridding of the previous. Have fun, my pookies!!
